start: Keep this part, delete the rest

ja.title: 行末まで削除する
ja.description: delete the rest を削除して Keep this part, だけ残してください
hints: 消したい位置まで移動してから、カーソルから行末までを一発で消すコマンドを使う
notes: f, でカンマに飛び l で 1 つ右へ。D でそこから行末まで削除する
D は d$ の短縮形。動きは同じ

en.title: Delete to end of line
en.description: Delete 'delete the rest' so only 'Keep this part,' remains
hints: Move to where the deletion should start, then use the one-key command that deletes to the end of the line
notes: f, jumps to the comma, l steps past it, then D deletes to the end of the line
D is shorthand for d$ — same result
